mapper.select: select * from warehouse_batch where food_id = #{foodId} and remain_qty > 0 order by in_time asc

SELECT warehouse_batch.food_id AS foodId, sys_food_info.food_name AS foodName, sys_food_info.food_type AS foodType, sys_food_info.unit AS unit, SUM(warehouse_batch.remain_qty) AS totalStock FROM warehouse_batch left join sys_food_info on warehouse_batch.food_id = sys_food_info.food_id WHERE warehouse_batch.remain_qty > 0
AND sys_food_info.food_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{foodName}, '%')
AND sys_food_info.food_type = #{foodType}
GROUP BY warehouse_batch.food_id, sys_food_info.food_name ORDER BY warehouse_batch.food_id
